title: orchis pallens subsp. provincialis
intro: Orchis pallens subsp. provincialis, also known as the slender tongue orchid, is a sub-species of orchid that belongs to the Orchidaceae family. It is a type of flowering plant that is native to certain regions in Europe and Asia, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, which can help to alleviate various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems. The slender tongue orchid can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its efficacy and safety may vary depending on the preparation and dosage.
